LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 301, AS TO THE JAN-27-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LAUREN BRUNNER'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF LAUREN BRUNNER'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PAY $498.67 IN COSTS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO INDEPENDENT TAXI ASSOCIATION. THIS AMOUNT IS CALCULATED AS THE AMOUNT STATED IN THE OPPOSITION MEMORANDUM LESS THE TWO ANTICIPATED FEES. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING WITH A COVER LETTER STATING COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/HEK)

MOTION TO TAX COSTS
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. BRITTANY ROGERS, Esq. of The Law Office of Scott Righthand (tel: 415-544-0115) for Plaintiff.
Atty. HUDA TAHBOUB, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Foran Glennon (tel: 669-317-4278) for Defendant Tedros Sibhatu.
Atty. JOHN FEDOR, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Case Harvey Fedor (tel: 619-338-0300) for Defendant SFITA.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF LAUREN BRUNNER's MOTION TO TAX COSTS.

Matter argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Lauren Brunner's motion to tax costs is granted in part. Plaintiff is required to pay $498.67 in costs to defendant San Francisco Independent Taxi Association. This amount is calculated as the amount stated in the opposition memorandum less the two anticipated fees.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling with a cover letter stating compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)
